allow: Bash(python3 -c "import urllib.request, json; d=json.loads\(urllib.request.urlopen\(''https://pypi.org/pypi/markitdown/0.1.5/json''\).read\(\)\); [print\(r\) for r in d[''info''][''requires_dist''] or []]")
